# V8 Mathematical Proof Changelog

Added `25_MATHEMATICAL_PROOF_AND_EMPIRICAL_EVIDENCE/` with formal theorems, causal evidence cards, network null models, domain proof briefs, safe wording, and reproducible toy simulations.

New proof focus:

- monotone allocation theorem
- exposure feedback multiplier
- threshold cascade proof
- Bayesian fake-review proof
- coordination null-model proof
- recommender profile-injection proof
- royalty-pool diversion formula
- attribution pollution formula
- link-graph spam proof

The vault now distinguishes mathematical possibility, empirical causal proof, observational statistical proof, case proof, and intent proof.
